title: Marketing Lane State
description: Canonical state file for one marketing lane. Lives on winpc at ~/hn-lanes/<lane-id>/state.json. Read at every session start; updated after every meaningful action. The handoff document — when Mac is off and you reach the lane from iPhone, the lane reads THIS to know where it is, not chat scrollback. See fleet/marketing-shell/ARCHITECTURE.md for the doctrine.

lane_id.description: Canonical lane identifier. Must match the tmux session name (minus 'lane-' prefix for lanes).

owner_chat_session.description: Current Claude session ID owning this lane. Null if no active session. Set by winpc inherit / set on session start.

status.description: idle = no in-flight work; active = in-flight; blocked = waiting on external dep; paused = explicitly held by owner.

last_action_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of last write to this state file.

current_action.description: One-line description of what's being worked on, if anything. Null if idle.

branch.description: Active git branch this lane is working on. Convention: claude/<lane-name>-<slug>.

in_flight.description: Actions started but not done. Each must eventually complete or be moved to open_items.

target.description: What the verb operates on. Free-form for now; will dimensionalize when COA layer lands.

awaiting.description: What this action is currently blocked on. Null if actively progressing.

open_items.description: Known TODOs for this lane, prioritized.

owner_decision_required.description: True if Nihaf must decide before the lane can proceed.

cross_lane_refs.description: Other lane IDs this lane consumes from or produces for. Used by orchestrator to detect dependencies.

kpis_this_month.description: Lane-specific KPIs. Schema is per-lane. Conventions documented in ARCHITECTURE.md.

last_orchestrator_audit.description: When the orchestrator last audited this lane.

schema_version.description: Bump if the schema changes. Lanes refusing unknown schema_version is the safety net.
